item.title: MtF HRT Infodump
item.description: Disclaimer I am not a medical professional. The knowledge here stems from other transgender people, my own experiences, and personal research. Private Overview There is the option to pay a private healthcare provider to handle your transition. They will charge fees for services, but often have significantly shorter waiting times than NHS services. They should conduct assessments, organise relevant blood tests, issue prescriptions, and oversee the medical process. This may be attractive for those who don’t wish to self-medicate.
